overall.description: A cinematic walkthrough of an ancient Egyptian marketplace in a video game, transitioning from covered fabric stalls through narrow stone streets to a sunny waterfront with a docked ship and camel. The scene features warm desert lighting and historic architecture.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered marketplace with orange fabric canopies overhead. The camera passes pottery stalls and rug displays before turning left at a weapon stall with a red-plumed helmet. NPC vendors and shoppers are scattered throughout the sheltered area.

segments.scene_description: Moving into a sunlit main street lined with multi-story stone buildings. The camera passes a woman in a blue dress walking in the opposite direction, with textile stalls and hanging banners visible along the route. The street is wider and more open than the previous covered market.

segments.scene_description: Navigating a narrower alleyway with hanging laundry lines overhead and a large hay cart parked on the right. The ground is sandy with scattered straw, and clay urns line the building walls. The space feels more residential and enclosed before opening up ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock with ships and camel

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto a wide waterfront with palm trees and a large ancient ship with purple sails docked nearby. A camel with saddle packs stands prominently in the foreground, while a lighthouse and distant mountains are visible across the water. The scene is bright and open with clear views of the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sheltered Egyptian marketplace that gradually opens into a bright, expansive waterfront. It begins beneath orange fabric canopies, passing pottery and rug displays before turning left past a red-plumed helmet at a weapon stall. As the camera leaves the covered area, the scene expands into a sunlit main street lined with multi-story stone buildings and hanging banners, where a woman in a blue dress walks in the opposite direction. The path then narrows into a residential alleyway characterized by overhead laundry lines, sandy ground, and a parked hay cart, before finally emerging from the enclosure. The shot concludes by opening onto a wide, bright waterfront featuring palm trees, a docked ship with purple sails, and a saddled camel set against a backdrop of a distant lighthouse and mountains.
